mapper.sql: CASE WHEN end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < #{now} THEN 0 WHEN status IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0
AND = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, start_time, end_time, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusText}, 0, #{createTime}, #{createTime} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, shop_id, shop_name, colonel_buyin_id, commission_rate, service_rate, start_time, end_time, status, last_sync_at, deleted, create_time, update_time, extra_data ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{colonelBuyinId}, #{commissionRate}, #{serviceRate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusText}, #{lastSyncAt}, 0, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastSyncAt}, CAST(#{extraData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO UPDATE SET activity_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_name, colonel_activity.activity_name), shop_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.shop_id, colonel_activity.shop_id), shop_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.shop_name, colonel_activity.shop_name), colonel_buyin_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.colonel_buyin_id, colonel_activity.colonel_buyin_id), commission_rate = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.commission_rate, colonel_activity.commission_rate), service_rate = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.service_rate, colonel_activity.service_rate), start_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.start_time, colonel_activity.start_time), end_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.end_time, colonel_activity.end_time), status = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.status, colonel_activity.status), last_sync_at = EXCLUDED.last_sync_at, extra_data = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.extra_data, colonel_activity.extra_data), deleted = 0, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT id, activity_id AS activityId, activity_name AS name, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, CASE WHEN end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 0 WHEN status IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS status, shop_id AS shopId, shop_name AS shopName, colonel_buyin_id AS colonelBuyinId, commission_rate AS commissionRate, service_rate AS serviceRate, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_by AS createBy, update_by AS updateBy, deleted FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1
SELECT extra_data FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1
